title: ilex macfadyenii subsp. ovata
intro: Ilex macfadyenii subsp. ovata is a subspecies of the Ilex macfadyenii plant, a type of holly tree native to New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ilex macfadyenii subsp. ovata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
